title: BEM-865 wire codex runner queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
step = '''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}\n        run: |\n          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || true\n'''
if 'Process workflow dispatch queue' not in text:
    idx = text.rfind('\n      - name:')
    if idx != -1:
        text = text[:idx] + step + text[idx:]
    else:
        text = text.rstrip() + step + '\n'
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
ops_applied.append('wired workflow dispatch queue processor into codex-runner')
"""
No issue comments.
